message:
fix(tui): make PiConsole mutable in test capture calls

Fix three test functions that called begin_capture()/render_markdown()
on immutable PiConsole references. The render_markdown method requires
&mut self for internal buffer management:

- capture_markdown_segments(): let console -> let mut console
- render_markdown_produces_styled_segments(): same fix
- render_markdown_code_fence_uses_syntax_highlighting_when_language_present():
  same fix

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
